headline: Generative AI Server Market Research and Forecast Report 2025-2030: Lucrative Opportunities in AI Chip Innovation and Open Hardware Initiatives and Emerging Markets
summary: The generative AI server market is poised for significant growth, expanding from USD 103.92 billion in 2025 to USD 448.60 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 34.0%. Cloud deployment is set to dominate due to its scalability, flexibility, and cost benefits, addressing the high computational needs of generative AI tasks like large language models and real-time inference.
